summary: Project involves managing a collection of letters/documents, with features to remove specific letter types (e.g., GST Letter, Loan Section Letter) and apply watermarks.

existing_features.title: Remove the 'Loan Section Letter' document type from the list of available document types in the frontend. It should no longer appear as an option in the document type selector in FormSection, and its built-in template definition should be removed from getTemplate.ts.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove loan section letter from the list
Remove the 'Loan Section Letter' loan type from the backend's LoanType definition in backend/main.mo to keep the data model consistent with the frontend changes.

projectName: Remove Loan Section Letter document type
